workData.title: TourMob
workData.Description:
Created a personalised suggestion engine by combining multiple maps and travel APIs to generate routes that are perfectly suited to users' mobility needs.
Using SQLite and Java-based backend services, a solid local-centric data architecture was developed, ensuring 100% system reliability and offline accessibility for users in low-connection areas.
Implemented accessibility-based UI/UX guidelines aligned with UN SDG 10 (Reduced Inequalities) 
Managed the whole software development lifecycle with Github version control, resulting in a ready to use solution that solved critical accessibility issues in tourism. 
During experimental validation, the accessible-first and personalization UX/UI got a 85% positive user feedback rating, showing the effectiveness of removing travel barriers.

workData.title: Plantation
workData.Description:
Developed and led the retail idea, executing the omni-channel strategy and business model design to combine online and in-store agriculture commerce.
Using Wix, a fully working e-commerce platform was created, with automated workflows for safe transactions, subscriptions and product listings.
Generated robust test cases for a range of customer scenarios, such as online orders, in-store returns and ongoing subscriptions, to optimise system dependability and user journey reliability.
Organised collaborative team duties and integrated diverse content into a cohesive digital environment, ensuring that the project met all business objectives.

workData.title: NZHome
workData.Description:
Collaborated within a 7-member team to design and develop a system aimed at reducing energy consumption and generation inefficiencies. 
Developed a cloud-hosted web system deployed on Vercel, with PostgreSQL used for data storage. 
Implemented MQTT as the primary IoT communication protocol to transmit real-time data from smart devices to the database. 
Built the web application using HTML, CSS, and ReactJS. 
 Contributed to both technical development and team coordination, supporting task organisation and project progress.
